name: Bread Machine Bruschetta
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the ingredients into the bread machine as your machine instructs.
2. After baking is complete, remove the bread from the machine pan and allow it to cool on a wire rack.
3. To make bruschetta, prepare the garlic olive oil first.
4. Slice the bread into 1/3-1/2 inch thick pieces.
5. Brush both sides of each slice with garlic olive oil.
6. Toast the slices until golden and crusty on a grill.
7. Cut each toasted slice into 4 triangles.
8. Top each piece with bruschetta topping.
